projects.Name: RPG with CCG template
projects.Description: A Unity Asset that combines TCG with RPG style. Ideal for developers building card battlers, deck-building roguelikes, or story-driven combat games.

projects.Name: Battlefield TCG Template Prototype
projects.Description: Battlefield TCG Template is a TCG game with a battlefield based on the new TCG game Riftbound. This is the working early-stage prototype.
